tasks.label: 🚨 P0-1 | Copy 14 ONYX UX files into repo
tasks.detail: Copies all 14 files from pios-impl/ into correct src/ paths.

tasks.label: 🚨 P0-2 | Patch onboarding/complete to save theme
🚨 P0-3 | TypeScript: confirm 0 errors
tasks.command: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tee /tmp/pios-ts.log && echo '✅ 0 errors' || (echo '❌ errors:' && cat /tmp/pios-ts.log)

tasks.label: 🚨 P0-ALL | Full P0 sprint runner (copy → patch → TS → build → deploy)
🔑 ENV-1 | Add STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
tasks.command: vercel env add STRIPE_SECRET_KEY production --team team_w1nbEmo6pfxJQ9NkYgDGxh3U

tasks.label: 🔑 ENV-2 | Add STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY
tasks.command: vercel env add NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY production --team team_w1nbEmo6pfxJQ9NkYgDGxh3U

tasks.label: 🔑 ENV-3 | Add STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET
tasks.command: vercel env add STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET production --team team_w1nbEmo6pfxJQ9NkYgDGxh3U

tasks.label: 🔑 ENV-4 | Add RESEND_API_KEY
tasks.command: vercel env add RESEND_API_KEY production --team team_w1nbEmo6pfxJQ9NkYgDGxh3U

tasks.label: 🔑 ENV-5 | Add Gmail OAuth (3 vars)
tasks.command: vercel env add GMAIL_CLIENT_ID production --team team_w1nbEmo6pfxJQ9NkYgDGxh3U && vercel env add GMAIL_CLIENT_SECRET production --team team_w1nbEmo6pfxJQ9NkYgDGxh3U && vercel env add GMAIL_REDIRECT_URI production --team team_w1nbEmo6pfxJQ9NkYgDGxh3U

tasks.label: 🔑 ENV-6 | Set APP_URL = pios.veritasiq.io
tasks.command: echo 'https://pios.veritasiq.io' | vercel env add APP_URL production --team team_w1nbEmo6pfxJQ9NkYgDGxh3U

tasks.label: 🎨 UX-3 | Commit ONYX sprint
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m 'feat(ux): ONYX design system + command centre theme selector + onboarding fix'

tasks.label: 🏗️ FEAT-1 | Build /platform/frameworks

tasks.detail: Resend inbound webhook → classify → email_triage_queue

📚 CREATIVE-1 | Build /platform/content series dashboard

tasks.label: 📚 CREATIVE-2 | Build episode drafting UI
tasks.detail: NemoClaw drafts 1,300–1,450 word episode with cliffhanger. Word count live. Approve → publish.

tasks.label: 📚 CREATIVE-3 | Build /api/content/draft-episode
tasks.detail: Reads bible + last 3 eps + creative_characters → NemoClaw → saves draft_text + updates episode_queue

tasks.label: 📚 CREATIVE-4 | Build /api/content/consistency-check
tasks.detail: Checks draft against creative_characters statuses + worldbuilding rules → consistency_score + flags

tasks.label: 📚 CREATIVE-5 | Build character manager UI
tasks.detail: creative_characters CRUD. Kaelo Mthembu already seeded.

tasks.label: 📚 CREATIVE-6 | Build worldbuilding knowledge base UI
tasks.detail: creative_worldbuilding browser. Blood Oath mythology + Three Layers + Mfecane seeded.

tasks.label: 📚 CREATIVE-7 | Build Pocket FM publish panel
tasks.detail: Connects platform_credentials. Submits to Pocket FM. Logs content_publish_log.

tasks.label: 📚 CREATIVE-8 | Build planned series pipeline UI
tasks.detail: Add/manage planned_series. NemoClaw helps develop series bible for new titles.

tasks.label: 📚 CREATIVE-DB | Blood Oath Chronicles state
tasks.command: npx supabase db execute --project-ref vfvfulbcaurqkygjrrhh --sql "SELECT title, pen_name, total_episodes, published_episodes, current_episode, is_flagship FROM content_series WHERE slug='blood-oath-chronicles';"

tasks.label: 📚 CREATIVE-DB | Episode queue
tasks.command: npx supabase db execute --project-ref vfvfulbcaurqkygjrrhh --sql 'SELECT episode_number, stage, scheduled_for FROM episode_queue ORDER BY episode_number;'

tasks.label: 📚 CREATIVE-DB | Character roster
tasks.command: npx supabase db execute --project-ref vfvfulbcaurqkygjrrhh --sql 'SELECT name, role, status, introduced_episode FROM creative_characters ORDER BY introduced_episode;'

tasks.label: 🛡️ HEAL-1 | Build ErrorBoundary + report widget
tasks.detail: Catches errors → /api/reporting/capture → shows user auto-heal status + report button

tasks.label: 🛡️ HEAL-2 | Build /api/reporting/capture
tasks.detail: Saves incident → checks self_heal_rules → if match + auto_execute: heals in same request → returns {heal_attempted, outcome, message}

tasks.label: 🛡️ HEAL-3 | Build /api/reporting/self-heal
tasks.detail: Core healing engine: retry/recreate_profile/refresh_session/reset_integration/notify_admin/etc. → logs self_heal_actions → updates incident status

tasks.label: 🛡️ HEAL-4 | Build /api/cron/health-check
tasks.detail: Runs every 30 min. Checks DB/auth/cron/Stripe/Resend/AI/storage. Writes system_health_checks. Creates escalation if consecutive_failures >= 3.

tasks.label: 🛡️ HEAL-5 | Build /platform/health admin dashboard
tasks.detail: system_health_checks status board, open incidents, escalations, self-heal log, user feedback. Admin only.

tasks.label: 🛡️ HEAL-6 | Build ReportIssueWidget
tasks.detail: Floating ? button in command centre. bug/feature/confusion/praise. Auto-captures path + module + user_id. Shows heal status after submit.

tasks.label: 🛡️ HEAL-7 | Add health-check cron to vercel.json
tasks.detail: Add health-check (*/30 * * * *), filing-agent (0 */2 * * *), preference-agent (0 2 * * *)

tasks.label: 🛡️ HEAL-8 | Build /api/reporting/feedback
tasks.detail: Saves to user_feedback. Sends Resend notification for bugs/features.

tasks.label: 🛡️ HEAL-DB | Open incidents
tasks.command: npx supabase db execute --project-ref vfvfulbcaurqkygjrrhh --sql "SELECT title, severity, status, heal_outcome, api_route, created_at FROM incident_reports WHERE status NOT IN ('resolved','self_healed') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;"

tasks.label: 🛡️ HEAL-DB | Self-heal action log
tasks.command: npx supabase db execute --project-ref vfvfulbcaurqkygjrrhh --sql 'SELECT rule_name, strategy, outcome, attempt_number, duration_ms, started_at FROM self_heal_actions ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 20;'

tasks.label: 🛡️ HEAL-DB | System health board
tasks.command: npx supabase db execute --project-ref vfvfulbcaurqkygjrrhh --sql 'SELECT check_name, check_type, status, response_ms, consecutive_failures, checked_at FROM system_health_checks ORDER BY status, check_type;'

tasks.label: 🛡️ HEAL-DB | Active self-heal rules
tasks.command: npx supabase db execute --project-ref vfvfulbcaurqkygjrrhh --sql 'SELECT rule_name, match_api_route, match_http_status, heal_strategy, auto_execute, priority FROM self_heal_rules WHERE is_active=true ORDER BY priority;'

tasks.label: 🏢 ENT-6 | Build white-label config editor + logo upload
tasks.detail: White-label editor for app name, colors, logos, footer control, and support details.

tasks.label: 🏢 ENT-7 | Build custom domain resolution in middleware
tasks.detail: Resolve custom domains and map tenant white-label config in middleware.

tasks.label: 🏢 ENT-8 | Build DPA signing page in admin
tasks.detail: Tenant admin DPA review and signing flow backed by dpa_agreements.

tasks.label: 🏢 ENT-9 | Build audit log viewer for compliance reporting
tasks.detail: Compliance-facing audit log explorer with tenant/action/outcome filters.

tasks.label: 🏢 ENT-10 | Build getWhiteLabelConfig() utility + middleware hook
tasks.detail: Shared white-label config loader used by middleware and tenant-aware layouts.

tasks.label: 🏢 ENT-DB | Seat usage
tasks.command: npx supabase db execute --project-ref vfvfulbcaurqkygjrrhh --sql 'SELECT tenant_name, seats_limit, seats_used, at_capacity FROM tenant_seat_usage;'

tasks.label: 🗄️ DB-1 | Migration status (expect M001-M033)
tasks.command: npx supabase db execute --project-ref vfvfulbcaurqkygjrrhh --sql 'SELECT version, name FROM supabase_migrations.schema_migrations ORDER BY version;'

tasks.label: 🗄️ DB-2 | RLS gap check (expect 0 rows)
tasks.command: npx supabase db execute --project-ref vfvfulbcaurqkygjrrhh --sql "SELECT tablename FROM pg_tables t WHERE schemaname='public' AND (rowsecurity=false OR (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_policies p WHERE p.tablename=t.tablename AND p.schemaname='public')=0) ORDER BY tablename;"

tasks.label: 🗄️ DB-3 | Audit seed data
tasks.command: npx supabase db execute --project-ref vfvfulbcaurqkygjrrhh < scripts/seed-data-audit.sql

tasks.label: 🗄️ DB-4 | Clear seed data (DESTRUCTIVE)
tasks.command: read -p 'Type CONFIRM: ' c && [ "$c" = 'CONFIRM' ] && npx supabase db execute --project-ref vfvfulbcaurqkygjrrhh < scripts/seed-data-clear.sql || echo Cancelled.

tasks.label: 🗄️ DB-5 | Orphaned users (expect 0)
tasks.command: npx supabase db execute --project-ref vfvfulbcaurqkygjrrhh --sql "SELECT COUNT(*) AS orphaned FROM auth.users u WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM public.user_profiles p WHERE p.id=u.id);"

tasks.label: 🗄️ DB-6 | Dimitry master profile
tasks.command: npx supabase db execute --project-ref vfvfulbcaurqkygjrrhh --sql "SELECT display_name, persona_type, command_centre_theme, tenant_role, is_tenant_admin, organisation FROM user_profiles WHERE id='47621611-96bc-465c-913e-0d23a89465f5';"

tasks.label: 🧪 UAT-6 | Reporting capture smoke test
tasks.detail: After HEAL-2 is built — should return {heal_attempted, outcome}

tasks.label: 💳 STRIPE-2 | Create CPD course products
tasks.command: echo 'CPD Starter £15, Standard £25, Full £35 — all one-time payments'

tasks.label: 🌐 INFRA-2 | Verify DNS
tasks.command: dig pios.veritasiq.io CNAME +short && curl -sI https://pios.veritasiq.io | head -3

tasks.label: 🌐 INFRA-3 | Verify Resend DNS (SPF + DKIM)
tasks.command: dig TXT veritasiq.io +short && dig TXT resend._domainkey.veritasiq.io +short

tasks.label: 🌐 INFRA-4 | ⚠️ PAT expires 16 May — rotate before 9 May
tasks.command: node -e "const d=new Date('2026-05-09');const n=new Date();console.log('Days to rotate: '+(Math.ceil((d-n)/86400000)));console.log('URL: https://github.com/settings/tokens');"

tasks.label: 🔧 DEV-3 | Local build
tasks.command: npm run build 2>&1 | tee /tmp/pios-build.log && echo '✅ Build OK' || echo '❌ Failed'

tasks.label: 🔧 DEV-6 | Audit cron auth (CRON_SECRET check)
tasks.command: find src/app/api/cron -name 'route.ts' | xargs grep -rL 'CRON_SECRET' 2>/dev/null && echo 'UNPROTECTED!' || echo '✅ All protected'
